input.testCaseTitle: After login from product Manager,Uploaded Image is not be shown during product Manager login.
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-193 reported defect: After login from product Manager,Uploaded Image is not be shown during product Manager login.
input.errorMessage: After login from product Manager, Uploaded Image is not be shown during product Manager login.

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: Uploaded product images were not visible under the Product Manager login. The role-specific asset visibility path was fixed and verified on the development server.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.74. ui-regression is acceptable because the symptom is image display; confidence is limited by sparse evidence.
